Spring Festival

17 feb 2026

Lunar New Year centered on family reunions, red envelopes, travel and seasonal commerce.

Cultural
🪔

Diwali

8 nov 2026

The festival of lights, an important religious, cultural, travel, gifting and retail period.

Religious
🦃

Thanksgiving Day

26 nov 2026

A US public holiday that starts the peak holiday retail period before Black Friday and Cyber Monday.

Public
🎄

Christmas Day

25 dic 2026

A major global public holiday and one of the largest travel, retail, family and religious periods of the year.

Public
